g.data-narration: This topic covers color image processing concepts in computer vision and image processing.
g.text: Color Image Processing - Core Concepts

g.data-narration: Color fundamentals describe how humans perceive and machines represent color information.

g.data-narration: Color image processing extends grayscale techniques to multi-channel color data.

g.data-narration: Color-based segmentation uses color similarity to partition images into regions.
